← All tools

Chiptune SFX Lab

Design classic 8-bit game sound effects with a retro synth engine — jump, coin, laser, explosion and more. Tweak the knobs, preview instantly, export a real WAV file. Nothing leaves your browser.

Presets — click to load & play, 🎲 to load a random variation

Preview

—

Export

Sound bank

Save up to 8 sounds locally to build a small SFX pack for a game jam.

Sounds are synthesized live in your browser with the Web Audio API · nothing is uploaded · a max tool
